index.heroHeadline: How a single dollar becomes a decade of freedom
index.heroDeck: Compound interest rewards patience over prediction. We trace one ordinary dollar across thirty years — and explain why time in the market beats timing it.

editorCards.title: The 50/30/20 rule — and when to break it
editorCards.excerpt: Budgeting frameworks are guides, not gospel. Here's how to adapt the classic rule to your actual life.

editorCards.title: Avalanche vs. snowball — the smarter payoff method
editorCards.excerpt: Both work. One saves you more money. We break down the math and the psychology behind each approach.

editorCards.title: What your 401(k) statement is actually telling you
editorCards.excerpt: Most people glance and file. We show you the five numbers that actually matter — and what to do about them.

about.subtitle: A newsletter for people who want practical, clear financial guidance without the noise.
about.introText: We help readers build confidence around money with practical, actionable insights on saving, investing, taxes, and planning for the future.

cards.title: Why we exist
cards.details: To translate financial complexity into clear ideas you can use today — whether you’re planning a budget, saving for a goal, or building long-term wealth.

cards.title: How we work
cards.details: Each piece is grounded in real money decisions, not headlines. We focus on what matters, why it matters, and the next step that makes it easier to act.

cards.title: Who it’s for
cards.details: For readers who want less noise and more confidence. If you want financial clarity without hype, this publication is built for you.

contact.subtitle: Have a question, feedback, or partnership idea? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.introText: Whether you have feedback, topic ideas, or partnership questions, we’re here to help. Reach us through email or social for a fast response.

cards.title: Editorial inquiries
cards.details: Send us story ideas, guest pitch questions, or questions about a published article.

cards.title: Partnerships
cards.details: Interested in sponsorships, collaborations, or sponsored content? Let’s talk about how we can work together.
